feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP ARIBA (SAP RISE Subs...
entry.content:
Precog is an approved and widely used data integration solution that makes it easy to get data from Ariba, SuccessFactors, Concur, Fieldglass, CX, S/4 HANA, Business One, Marketing Cloud, and more (2000+ SaaS APIs) into Datasphpere (and other data warehouses/databases): ELT for Datasphere.

Here's a good overview (video) of the AI-driven, no-code data integration (ELT) solution: Precog An SAP BTP Story

entry.title: I have a date column and I want to derive Week range
entry.content: I have a date column and I want to derive Week range for that column considering Monday-Saturday as first day and last day of the week. I tried the same in transformations it did work but. It fails when loading the data. It asks for transformation to map. Need some steps to achieve this

entry.title: SAC: Find drill level in hierarchy based on string
entry.content:
I would like the user to chose an organisational unit in a hierarchy and then the chart should depict the corresponding drill level with the node expanded.

getHierarchyLevel - just gives me the selected level 

Analytics Designer API Reference Guide Version 2024.2 (sap.com)

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Set Advanced Filters on Date and Version
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

currently I am working with Advanced Filters. I want to set the Filter based on Date and Version. Like you can see in the image:

The outcome does not meet my excpectation:

As you can see "2 Forecast III" is also shown in the years 2022, 2023 and 2024 (not in image). But my expectation was that for "2 Forecast III" only 2024 is shown.

What is the issue in this case?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Not able to see run button on dataflow
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created new SAP Datasphere tenant and we are not able to see run button for dataflow or neither on Data Integration Monitor( Run, Stop and Resume button ) .
Let us know if we are missing any configuration or role.

entry.title: SAP Queries/Infoset Queries data import to SAC (SAP ECC not on HANA)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we have a requirement to extract SAP Queries/Infosets from SAP ECC (on maxDB) to SAP Analytics Cloud? Does anyone have experience already with it and know the painpoints (example with the data import of InfoSet Queries, best practices and does/dont does?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,

Regys

entry.title: Blending Tables (Import Models)
entry.content:
SAP Documentation says Table blending (import models) is possible. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/d02b8bfddf5844a39fc69fdf586056c8.html

But in ODE I am unable to ( When I hover over in the design panel, its greyed out and it says not supported).

I have linked the dimensions and I am able to blend charts, though just not the tables.

entry.title: 同一个故事下面，两个不同的页面怎么进行数据联动进行链接分析(Under the same story, how to link two different pages for data linkag)
entry.content: 例如：点击下面的575数字，可以链接到员工详情页面。相当于怎么把详情表的值汇总到一个汇总页面。(For example, clicking on the 575 number below will link to the employee details page. It is equivalent to how to summarize the values of the detail table into a summary page.)

entry.title: Set SAC standard Filter (Filter Panel) to display "ID & Description" by default
entry.content:
Hello,

Our end users would very much like to have the standard SAC Filter ('Filter Panel' when hovering over the icon) set to display "ID & Description" rather than the current default/on first opening of the Filter/Filter Panel display setting of "Description".

Of course the end user can change this themselves with three clicks, but is there a setting that we can't find, to set the standard SAC Filter to display "ID & Description" by default?

We want to stay as vanilla as possible so are at this moment not looking at scripting to solve this.

 

Thanks,

Nick.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Live connection SAP Analytcis Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need your help. Currently I am confinguring the live connection between S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Anlytics Cloud. I have followed the documentation in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html however I am stucked in the following step: 

SAML Single Sign-On (SSO) must be enabled in SAP Analytics Cloud

 

We are using SAP IAS, could you please explain me how to upload the metadata file from SAP  Analytics cloud to SAP IAS? Thank you #sapanalyticscloud #s/4hanacloud

entry.title: How to create a rolling forecast in SAC? I have an actual and budget version for 2024.
entry.content:
I am trying to build a rolling forecast in SAC. Have seen some instructions but the information is vague.
I have an actual version and a budget version for 2024. 
What prerequisites do I have to build a rolling forecast? I know how to get the forecast layout in a story. If I choose actuals of three months to look back or a cut off date and 15 month to look ahead, how to I get values in the forecasted months?

entry.title: link chart and table in SAC
entry.content:
Chart_1 is id of a numeric chart shows count of customers. 

Table_1 is id of a table has columns of customer name, Network id.

now upon clicking chart_1 it should redirect to Table _1 to show reference.

entry.title: 下拉框怎么选择指定的数据模型，并选择数据模型中的维
entry.content: 预期：下拉框内容为查询在职员工数据模型中的姓名字段，并且选择名字后，列表能根据选择的名字实时变化。请教一下各位大佬，这个该如何实现？

entry.title: Extract Stories using the rest api in SAC trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP Analytics Cloud. Need to get the details of Stories and Models from SAP Analytics Cloud using the REST APIs in the trial account. So far I could see, from the documentation, we have the rest apis available and with OAUTH authentication, which needs Administrator option for OAUTH client. 

Is there any other option available to execute REST APIs in a trial account ? Any help in this regard would be helpful.

Thanks,

Sreedhar Rusuma

entry.title: 地理地图不支持中国地区的城市，根据人员所在区域进行高亮显示吗
entry.content: 我看这个下载的支持列表里面只有整体的，没有大陆具体城市

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Custom Widget Testing
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm not an experienced developer and have just successfully developed my first custom widgets.

However, I found the testing process for my implementation to be cumbersome. Every time I added a new line of code or encountered an error, I had to delete the custom widget from SAC and re-upload the changed files.

Is there any way to test the code directly in the browser without having to delete and re-upload to SAC each time? Currently, the widgets consist of three JavaScript files for the main, builder, and styling, along with a JSON file. I attempted to test the script using a live server extension in VS Code, but without success (I'm also new to web components). I would greatly appreciate any advice or guidance on this matter.

Thanks & best regards

Tim

entry.title: Different types of decimal types in dataset
entry.content:
Hi all

the problem that I have is that our data is from different countries. Which means that some people will use a '.' or a ',' as a decimal type. But Datasphere cannot work with both at the same time. Is there anyway I can fix this? This field could also be left empty or '0'. I already tried to make something (see pictures) but it still filters out some data.

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Change empty fields '-' to '0'
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently building in Datasphere but I ran into a small problem. The fields that contain no values (displayed as '-' in datasphere, get filtered out later on in my view. But fields that have a '0' as value, do not get filtered out. So an "easy" solution to this seems to convert all the empty fields into '0', but I do not manage to find the expression for this. Anyone who can help me? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Clarification on Iterate function in SAC model
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can someone please help me in understanding the Iterate function. I have taken the below example : I have created 4 calculated measures with Iterate formula. 

My assumption after referring some doc is, Iterate function will do cumulative sum based on dimension values(let's consider the date dimension with different granularity). For this I have considered the below example, where i have created multiple Calculated measures with Iterate function with all date(considered only 2024 and 2025) permutation. so since we have 12 month data, the iterate function should do cumulative for 24 times and summation should result in 240. 

 

Based on the above output, I see all the calculated measures are matching with my assumption, but for the Calculated measures Iterate Quantity Calday, I see the different values. 

Can someone please help me in getting this functionality of this Iterate. 

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: Successfactors story report maximum date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a story report which is returning multiple rows in my query.  But I need to show only one record in my story table which I am doing it as a cross tab table.  I need to find the maximum date(let's say the maximum date of effective start date for example) and show it in the report. How do I accomplish this? All the different calculated fields in the story are allowing the MAX function only for dimensions(numbers) and not date fields. 

Can you please let me know if you figured out a way to get the maximum date from multiple rows?

Thanks,

Vicky.
